issues.title: Error Values and Propagation Contract
issues.summary: Define the four typed spreadsheet error values (#DIV/0!, #VALUE!, #NAME?, #REF!) as distinct, comparable sentinels that never collide with cell text, plus the is-error predicate, the error-code reader, and the default first-error-wins propagation contract shared by every operator and function.

issues.title: CellRef A1 Addresses and Ranges
issues.summary: Implement the CellRef module that parses A1 cell addresses (case-insensitive column letters normalized to upper case) to and from zero-based column/row indices, rejects invalid addresses, and expands a colon range into its ordered row-by-row address list while normalizing reversed ranges.

issues.title: Sheet Cell Storage and Reads
issues.summary: Implement the Sheet as the sole owner of stored cell values keyed by normalized A1 address: set records a value, reading an unset address returns an empty cell value, single-cell reads return the stored value, and range reads return defensive copies of the rectangular block so callers cannot mutate stored state.

issues.title: Tokenizer Lexical Analysis
issues.summary: Implement the Tokenizer that lexes a formula string into a flat ordered token list (number, string, ref, name, operator, lparen, rparen, comma, eof), handling numeric and double-quoted string literals, A1 refs and ranges, function-name identifiers, skipped whitespace, and an unlexable character that yields a #NAME? error result rather than throwing.

issues.title: Pratt Parser and AST
issues.summary: Implement the precedence-climbing parser that turns the token list into an AST (number, string, ref, unary, binary, call nodes), encoding operator precedence and associativity, parenthesized grouping, comma-separated function-call arguments with verbatim names, and a #VALUE! error result for incomplete, unmatched, or trailing-token sequences.

issues.title: Function Registry and Calling Convention
issues.summary: Implement the case-insensitive function Registry and the shared calling convention: every function receives already-evaluated arguments including error values, default first-error propagation with the error-aware (IF, VLOOKUP, error predicate/reader) and error-skipping (COUNT) overrides, number/text argument coercion rules, and range flattening into a rectangular block.

issues.title: Math Functions
issues.summary: Register the math function family: SUM, AVERAGE, MIN, MAX, and COUNT aggregation with their empty-input results, ROUND with round-half-away-from-zero and negative digits, ABS, MOD carrying the divisor sign with a #DIV/0! on zero divisor, and POWER yielding #VALUE! for non-finite-real results.

issues.title: Logical Functions
issues.summary: Register the logical function family: the shared truthiness rule (boolean, nonzero number true, empty false, error propagates, other types #VALUE!), IF with error-condition propagation and a defaulted false branch, AND/OR over flattened ranges requiring a non-empty argument, and single-argument NOT.

issues.title: Text Functions
issues.summary: Register the text function family: CONCAT joining coerced arguments, LEN character count, UPPER/LOWER case conversion, TRIM trimming and collapsing internal spaces, LEFT/RIGHT substring extraction with count bounds, and MID one-based substring extraction, each returning #VALUE! on an invalid negative or below-one argument.

issues.title: Lookup Function VLOOKUP
issues.summary: Register VLOOKUP, searching the first column of a two-dimensional range for the key and returning the same-row value at a one-based columnIndex, supporting exact-match and sorted-ascending approximate-match modes and the #REF!/#VALUE! error cases for out-of-bounds columns, missing keys, empty or non-range arguments, and error-key propagation.

issues.title: Evaluator Tree Walk
issues.summary: Implement the Evaluator that reduces an AST to a single value as a pure function of the tree and the Sheet: literal and operator evaluation including division-by-zero, first-error operator propagation with non-short-circuiting call nodes, case-insensitive Registry dispatch with #NAME? for unknown functions, and single-cell and range reference resolution against the Sheet with #REF! for invalid references.

issues.title: Dependency Graph and Recalculation
issues.summary: Implement the DepGraph that records each formula cell's read set, exposes direct dependents, and computes a topological recalculation order; and the recalculation that recomputes only transitively affected cells in dependency order, resolves cyclic cells to #REF! while still terminating, and is deterministic regardless of cell-set order.

issues.title: Public API Surface
issues.summary: Implement the single public entry point: evaluate(formula, sheet) running the pipeline with optional leading-equals stripping and typed-error return, the empty-sheet factory exposing literal/formula set and current-value read with dependency registration, and the exported is-error predicate and error-code reader, enforcing the dependency-free in-memory architecture and the Sheet/API boundaries.
